## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy and next steps for Monograph's engagement with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy focuses on balancing authority-building topics with high SEO potential, targeting both architects and engineers](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Monograph aims to double SQLs from 30 to 60 per month within 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Deep dives planned: product walkthrough, Chris Morgan's insights, and CMS publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Exploring AI-related content opportunities, leveraging Monograph's system of record positioning](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Balancing authority-building topics with high SEO potential](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Targeting both architects and engineers, acknowledging differences in content needs](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Focusing on practice management, financial performance, and software comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Refreshing existing content and creating new pages based on keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Emphasizing practical, direct language in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Persona and Audience Insights

  - [Primary target: residential architecture firms (8-15 people, expanding to 5-50)](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Engineering firms now a key focus, with less existing content](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Architects: more artistic, less focused on business aspects](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
  - [Engineers: more systematic, quantitative thinkers](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
  - [Both use spreadsheets extensively, presenting an opportunity for Monograph](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)

### Content Refresh and SEO Strategy

  - [Analyzing internal URLs for keyword ranking and click potential](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Prioritizing content updates based on search volume and keyword difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Emphasizing recency and well-cited content to improve LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Exploring engineering-specific keywords where Monograph currently lacks visibility](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Voice and Tone Guidelines

  - [Practical, direct communication style](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Transparent expertise: confident but not arrogant](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Reader-focused approach, emphasizing empathy and real-world examples](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Highlighting the contrast between project management skills and business management](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

### AI Content Opportunities

  - [Exploring long-tail keywords combining AI with specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Leveraging Monograph's system of record positioning for a strong AI story](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Considering content around time tracking for specific engineering disciplines](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule product deep dive with Robert or team member](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
  - [Set up deep dive session with Chris Morgan, including CMS walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2405.0)
  - [Review existing use case videos and new release information before Chris's deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [Explore and plan AI-related content topics](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
  - [Analyze time tracking keywords for architects and various engineering specialties](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review all shared materials before follow-up meetings](https://fathom.video/share/mfpM48SccKRSwCAgksEXTHd3osR4hrom?tab=summary&timestamp=2824.0)
